Scripts.OnLoad: Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigurationTitleFrameMixin); self:OnLoad() self.titleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_PROFILE_CATEGORY; self.subTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_PROFILE_TEXT;

Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigTooltipMixin); self:OnLoad() Mixin(self, AuctionatorConfigCheckboxMixin); self:OnLoad() self.labelText = AUCTIONATOR_L_CONFIG_PROFILE_TOGGLE; self.tooltipTitleText = AUCTIONATOR_L_PROFILE_TOGGLE_TOOLTIP_HEADER; self.tooltipText = AUCTIONATOR_L_PROFILE_TOGGLE_TOOLTIP_TEXT;
